title: Fees for the right to sell licensed or authorized Class II, III or IV medical devices - Canada.ca
content:
## Fees for the right to sell licensed or authorized Class II, III or IV medical devices
Fee as of April 1, 2025
Fee as of April 1, 2026
The annual fee for the right to sell either a licensed Class II, III or IV medical device or an authorized Class II, III or IV medical device that is not an urgent public health need (UPHN) medical device
For relevant guidance documents and forms, please visit Fees for medical devices .
